sentiment.reasoning: Restructuring plans signal internal distress and a reactive approach to market headwinds, likely pressuring the stock.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business activity and provide negligible immediate impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory review of storage practices introduces potential compliance costs and operational friction.

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% margin improvement indicates successful cost management or pricing power, directly boosting profitability.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences faces regulatory review of data analytics practices

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
